The apartment is finished and fully equipped to a high standard, and is located in a newly completed residential building from 2026, at Rokickiego 2 Street in the Felin district of Lublin.The apartment is situated on the 1st floor and is a perfect choice for someone looking for a comfortable and well-designed home in a modern building, with convenient access to the city centre and very quick access to the Lublin ring road.Apartment features:- 43 m²- 1st floor- air conditioning- district heating- full energy-efficient LED lighting- first-time rental- modern building completed in 2026Layout and equipment:Living room with kitchenetteThe apartment offers a bright and comfortable living area with a modern kitchenette and custom-made furniture. It comes fully equipped with all essential appliances, including a fridge-freezer, dishwasher, oven, induction hob, microwave or Air Fryer, extractor hood, electric kettle, and a 55-inch Smart TV. The space also includes USB sockets, a sofa, dining table with chairs, coffee table, and stylish LED lighting.BedroomThe bedroom is furnished with a double bed with built-in storage, bedside lamps with USB ports, a dressing table or work desk, an illuminated mirror suitable also for makeup, and a built-in wardrobe.BathroomModern bathroom with a comfortable walk-in shower, concealed fittings, rain shower, washer-dryer, and custom-made cabinet.HallwayThe hallway includes a custom-built wardrobe and useful household equipment such as a vacuum cleaner, mop, brush, ironing board, and iron.BalconyThe apartment also has a spacious balcony.Location:The apartment is located in Felin, a modern and rapidly developing area of Lublin. It offers very good access to the city centre and is especially convenient for people who travel frequently by car thanks to its close proximity to the Lublin ring road.Additional information:- parking space available in the underground garage- storage unit included in the rental price- direct offer from the ownerRent: PLN 2,900Administrative fee: approx.
